name: Carne Guisada (Beef Stew)
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the fat, gristle, and connective tissue from the beef.
2. Fry the trimmings in a large (3-4 quart) stockpot until about 2 tablespoons of rendered fat remain for 6 servings. Discard the trimmings.
3. Add oil to the rendered fat in the pan.
4. Cut the meat into 1 1/2-inch cubes and set aside.
5. Mince the garlic, onion, and chiles together.
6. Peel and pulp the tomatoes.
7. Add the minced vegetables to a bowl.
8. Heat the oil in the stockpot until hot.
9. Sear the meat over high heat until browned on all sides.
10. Reduce heat and add the tomato and onion mixture.
11. Add all remaining ingredients except the tortillas, covering the pot.
12. Simmer until the meat is tender and the liquid becomes a rich sauce (1 1/2-2 hours).
13. Adjust seasonings as needed.
14. Serve with flour tortillas. The meat filling can be spooned onto the tortillas.
